title: citrus spinosa
intro: Citrus spinosa, also known as bitter orange or sour orange, is a species of citrus tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea, as well as its antiseptic and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Citrus spinosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Citrus spinosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of health conditions.
